violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the beverage service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Raw animal foods such as eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as beverages in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of pink and black residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
